title: ononis alba subsp. tuna
intro: Ononis alba subsp. tuna, also known as White Restharrow, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, characterized by its white flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Ononis alba subsp. tuna include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from joint pain and swelling. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
